_comment: FHWA-HRT-05-083 Appendix F Table 15 published stay 15S: m=47.93 kg/m, T=1.900e+06 N, L=76.549 m, omega=8.171 rad/s, f=1.3 Hz. Endpoint geometry is an assumed 30 deg planar chord because Table 15 does not publish coordinates. EA and diameter are inferred from mass using rho_steel=7850 kg/m^3 and E=200 GPa.
name: 15S

assumptions.geometry: planar 30 degree chord; not published in Table 15
assumptions.EA: E=200 GPa times steel-equivalent area mass/rho_steel
assumptions.diameter: steel-equivalent diameter from mass/rho_steel; aerodynamic diameter not published here
